nl_query: Which scripts have scan metadata indicating a quality score below 0.5, have been rescanned at least once, and are currently assigned to an evaluator but not yet frozen?
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, a.scan_metadata, sh.replaced_previous, sa.is_active
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   scan_history  sh ON sh.script_id = a.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
WHERE  a.scan_metadata->>'quality_score'::FLOAT < 0.5
  AND  sh.replaced_previous = TRUE
  AND  sa.is_active = TRUE
LIMIT  1000;
error:
Execution error: invalid input syntax for type double precision: "quality_score"
LINE 5: WHERE  a.scan_metadata->>'quality_score'::FLOAT < 0.5
                                 ^
